TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: niqan qlwaan thulan taywan/總統府 Qpahan Bukung Klwaan thulan taywan o niqan Pnstama qpahan klwaan, niqan phigan gaya, niqan klwaan klawa empsgaaw klwaan, niqan klawa pspung matas klwaan, niqan klawa dmqeepah klwaan, niqan qpahan pnegluban kklwaan , niqan qpahan euda klwaan, niqan qpahan djiyun klwaan, niqan qpahan pkrana klwaan, niqan qpahan euda gaya klwaan, niqan qpahan elug klwaan, niqan qpahan mduuy mrata klwaan, niqan qpahan knkla kndsan klwaan, niqan qpahan brihan qqlhang kndsan, niqan qpahan psbiyax hiyi, niqan qpahan mduuy knsat, niqan qpahan kklawa llingay, niqan qpahan kklawa qsiya, niqan qpahan kklawa rmigaw qtaan, niqan qpahan kklawa elug paru, niqan qpahan kklawa snliqan, niqan qpahan kklawa rnaaw, niqan qpahan kklawa pusu dnuuy , niqan qpahan kklawa dmqeepah, niqan qpahan kklawa dxgal, niqan qpahan kklawa seejiq ngayngay, niqan qpahan kklawa qngqaya, niqan qpahan kklawa karat, niqan sapah mdayaw miying qpahun ,lala bi glgan ka anu manu saw klwaan qpahan nii.pusu thulan bukung ta taywan sayang o Ciay ing wun,hiya o pnaah sbiyaw taywan thulan o,wana hiya ka kuyuh muuda saw pusu bi bukung thulan uri.
S.PHON: niqan qlwaan tħulan tajwan/*** qpaħan bukuŋ klwaan tħulan tajwan o niqan pnstama qpaħan klwaan, niqan pħigan gaja, niqan klwaan klawa əmpsgaaw klwaan, niqan klawa pspuŋ matas klwaan, niqan klawa dmqəəpaħ klwaan, niqan qpaħan pnəgluban kklwaan , niqan qpaħan əuda klwaan, niqan qpaħan dɟijun klwaan, niqan qpaħan pkɾana klwaan, niqan qpaħan əuda gaja klwaan, niqan qpaħan əlug klwaan, niqan qpaħan mduuj mɾata klwaan, niqan qpaħan knkla kndsan klwaan, niqan qpaħan bɾiħan qqlħaŋ kndsan, niqan qpaħan psbijax ħiji, niqan qpaħan mduuj knsat, niqan qpaħan kklawa lliŋaj, niqan qpaħan kklawa qsija, niqan qpaħan kklawa ɾmigaw qtaan, niqan qpaħan kklawa əlug paɾu, niqan qpaħan kklawa snliqan, niqan qpaħan kklawa ɾnaaw, niqan qpaħan kklawa pusu dnuuj , niqan qpaħan kklawa dmqəəpaħ, niqan qpaħan kklawa dxgal, niqan qpaħan kklawa səəɟiq ŋajŋaj, niqan qpaħan kklawa qŋqaja, niqan qpaħan kklawa kaɾat, niqan sapaħ mdajaw mijiŋ qpaħun ,lala bi glgan ka anu manu saw klwaan qpaħan nii.pusu tħulan bukuŋ ta tajwan sajaŋ o ʦiaj iŋ wun,ħija o pnaaħ sbijaw tajwan tħulan o,wana ħija ka kujuħ muuda saw pusu bi bukuŋ tħulan uɾi.
S.FORM: niqan qlwaan thulan taywan/總統府 Qpahan Bukung Klwaan thulan taywan o niqan Pnstama qpahan klwaan, niqan phigan gaya, niqan klwaan klawa empsgaaw klwaan, niqan klawa pspung matas klwaan, niqan klawa dmqeepah klwaan, niqan qpahan pnegluban kklwaan , niqan qpahan euda klwaan, niqan qpahan djiyun klwaan, niqan qpahan pkrana klwaan, niqan qpahan euda gaya klwaan, niqan qpahan elug klwaan, niqan qpahan mduuy mrata klwaan, niqan qpahan knkla kndsan klwaan, niqan qpahan brihan qqlhang kndsan, niqan qpahan psbiyax hiyi, niqan qpahan mduuy knsat, niqan qpahan kklawa llingay, niqan qpahan kklawa qsiya, niqan qpahan kklawa rmigaw qtaan, niqan qpahan kklawa elug paru, niqan qpahan kklawa snliqan, niqan qpahan kklawa rnaaw, niqan qpahan kklawa pusu dnuuy , niqan qpahan kklawa dmqeepah, niqan qpahan kklawa dxgal, niqan qpahan kklawa seejiq ngayngay, niqan qpahan kklawa qngqaya, niqan qpahan kklawa karat, niqan sapah mdayaw miying qpahun ,lala bi glgan ka anu manu saw klwaan qpahan nii.pusu thulan bukung ta taywan sayang o Ciay ing wun,hiya o pnaah sbiyaw taywan thulan o,wana hiya ka kuyuh muuda saw pusu bi bukung thulan uri.
S.PHON: niqan qlwaan tħulan tajwan/*** qpaħan bukuŋ klwaan tħulan tajwan o niqan pnstama qpaħan klwaan, niqan pħigan gaja, niqan klwaan klawa əmpsgaaw klwaan, niqan klawa pspuŋ matas klwaan, niqan klawa dmqəəpaħ klwaan, niqan qpaħan pnəgluban kklwaan , niqan qpaħan əuda klwaan, niqan qpaħan dɟijun klwaan, niqan qpaħan pkɾana klwaan, niqan qpaħan əuda gaja klwaan, niqan qpaħan əlug klwaan, niqan qpaħan mduuj mɾata klwaan, niqan qpaħan knkla kndsan klwaan, niqan qpaħan bɾiħan qqlħaŋ kndsan, niqan qpaħan psbijax ħiji, niqan qpaħan mduuj knsat, niqan qpaħan kklawa lliŋaj, niqan qpaħan kklawa qsija, niqan qpaħan kklawa ɾmigaw qtaan, niqan qpaħan kklawa əlug paɾu, niqan qpaħan kklawa snliqan, niqan qpaħan kklawa ɾnaaw, niqan qpaħan kklawa pusu dnuuj , niqan qpaħan kklawa dmqəəpaħ, niqan qpaħan kklawa dxgal, niqan qpaħan kklawa səəɟiq ŋajŋaj, niqan qpaħan kklawa qŋqaja, niqan qpaħan kklawa kaɾat, niqan sapaħ mdajaw mijiŋ qpaħun ,lala bi glgan ka anu manu saw klwaan qpaħan nii.pusu tħulan bukuŋ ta tajwan sajaŋ o ʦiaj iŋ wun,ħija o pnaaħ sbijaw tajwan tħulan o,wana ħija ka kujuħ muuda saw pusu bi bukuŋ tħulan uɾi.
